mapper.select: SELECT w.order_id AS workOrderId, w.product_id AS productId, w.order_qty AS orderQty, DATE_FORMAT(w.due_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dueDate, w.status AS status FROM work_order w WHERE w.order_id = #{workOrderId}
SELECT w.order_id AS workOrderId, w.product_id AS productId, DATE_FORMAT(w.due_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dueDate, w.status AS status FROM work_order w WHERE w.status = #{status} ORDER BY w.due_date ASC

SELECT wom.material_id AS materialId, wom.required_qty AS requiredQty, IFNULL(inv.qty, 0) AS availableQty, GREATEST(wom.required_qty - IFNULL(inv.qty,0), 0) AS shortageQty FROM work_order_material wom LEFT JOIN ( SELECT material_id, SUM(quantity) AS qty FROM material_inventory GROUP BY material_id ) inv ON inv.material_id = wom.material_id WHERE wom.work_order_id = #{workOrderId}
